accepted_findings: UE 5.8 now records exclusive UObject resource bytes, LOD0 render vertices, and LOD0 render triangles for all thirty-two generated crown-form meshes.
The isolated eight-form family accounts for 367,918,128 exclusive resource bytes, 6,961,948 LOD0 render vertices, and 3,859,140 LOD0 render triangles.
Forty successful offscreen capture wall-time samples range from 221.41 ms to 407.08 ms with a 241.35 ms median; these measure the authoring capture path, not gameplay frame time.
The unattended game/render/GPU frame-cycle counters are automatically rejected because the game-thread values are zero and the render/GPU values do not vary across samples.
All forty captures are byte-for-byte identical to the V10 visual-review hashes, and all eight physical near-centerline routing contracts remain passed.
rejection_reasons: A 350.87 MiB isolated family before corridor instancing, mixed ecology, and streaming overhead is too costly to promote without LOD reduction, batching, and measured budgets.
Offscreen editor capture wall time is not packaged desktop or VR frame-time evidence, and the stale frame-cycle counters cannot be used as a substitute.
No corridor-density HISM/PCG benchmark, masked-foliage overdraw profile, draw-call submission count, streaming test, or culling trace exists.
The V10 closeup topology rejection remains: projected silhouettes and abrupt procedural junctions are not yet photoreal.
Temporal wind, motion vectors, mixed native ecology, and source-matched corridor review remain open.
next_iteration_requirements: Create reduced near/far LODs and a corridor-density HISM/PCG benchmark map, then profile a packaged desktop build and the project VR target on device.
Capture masked overdraw, draw calls, streaming, culling, CPU, GPU, and memory budgets with repeatable warmup and percentile reporting.
Add deterministic temporal wind and motion-vector evidence with separate trunk, branchlet, and leaf response bounds.
Retain the V10 junction, projected-silhouette, primary-growth, and mixed-ecology requirements before corridor substitution.
